name: Domainsdb.info
description: Search the registered-domain database by name, zone, country, or DNS record values, and search domains within a specific top-level domain zone.

auth.hint: Register at domainsdb.info to obtain an API key, then send it as an Authorization: Bearer <key> header.

tools.name: search_domains
tools.description: Search the domains database with name, zone, country, status, and DNS record filters.

params.name: domain
params.description: Substring the domain name must include.

params.name: zone
params.description: Top-level domain zone to restrict results to, such as com or org.

params.name: country
params.description: Hosting country code to filter results.

params.name: isDead
params.description: Whether to include dead/expired domains; defaults to not dead.

params.name: A
params.description: A DNS record value the domain must include.

params.name: NS
params.description: NS DNS record value the domain must include.

params.name: page
params.description: Opaque search page token to request the next page of results.

tools.name: search_tld_domains
tools.description: Search registered domains within one specific top-level domain zone.

params.name: zone_id
params.description: TLD zone identifier, such as com or io.

params.name: domain
params.description: Substring the domain name must include.

params.name: page
params.description: Opaque search page token to request the next page of results.
